gold.title: File Tree
gold.reason: Top performer (644 downloads, 14 likes) — full context-driven tree with accordion expand/collapse, scroll area, multi-select, keyboard navigation, and selectable nodes. The definitive file tree for SaaS code editors and file managers.

gold.title: Filesystem Item
gold.reason: 468 downloads, 12 likes — clean recursive filesystem item with optional framer-motion spring animations on the chevron and AnimatePresence for children. Elegant, minimal, and production-ready.

gold.title: File Viewer
gold.reason: 124 downloads — full-featured file viewer with resizable panels, accordion tree, syntax-highlight hook (Shiki ready), copy/external-link actions, badges, and scroll areas. A Gold showpiece for developer-tool SaaS sites.

gold.title: Tree View
gold.reason: 221 downloads — framer-motion animated tree with connector lines, custom icon support, onNodeClick/onNodeExpand callbacks, and defaultExpandedIds. Feature-rich and visually polished for documentation or project dashboards.

gold.title: File Tree
gold.reason: 21 downloads — editable file tree with inline rename, add file/folder, delete, shadcn Card/Button/Input/Tooltip integration, and full CRUD state. Impressive depth for a UI component; ideal for SaaS project management UIs.

silver.title: File Tree
silver.reason: 106 downloads — color-coded extension icons (tsx/ts/js/css/json etc.) with depth-aware indent guides and isLast branching lines. Visually distinctive and practical for code showcase sections.

silver.title: Tree
silver.reason: 4 downloads but 10860 bytes of well-architected code — context-driven tree with multi-select (ctrl+click), show-lines/show-icons/selectable props, and motion/react animations. Strong design-system quality.

silver.title: Tree
silver.reason: 11 downloads — CVA-variant tree with Slot support, multi-select, expand toggle, motion animations, and showLines/showIcons props. Solid general-purpose tree but overlaps with preetsuthar17__tree-view.

silver.title: Tree
silver.reason: 62 downloads — @headless-tree/core powered tree with full keyboard and accessibility primitives via Radix Slot. Excellent for accessibility requirements; less visually distinctive out of the box.

silver.title: File Tree 1
silver.reason: 9 downloads — clean framer-motion animated tree with chevron rotation, AnimatePresence children, and defaultExpanded map. A leaner sibling to ruixen.ui__file-tree, good for read-only tree displays.

bronze.title: Glow Tree
bronze.reason: 0 downloads — adds a glow boolean flag to nodes but the visual effect is purely conceptual in the code snippet; niche novelty without clear application on real customer sites.

bronze.title: Magic Tree
bronze.reason: 6 downloads — Sparkles/Star icon tree variant; thematically fun but essentially identical in structure to ruixen.ui__file-tree-1 with different icons and no unique UX value.

bronze.title: Tree Node Tooltip
bronze.reason: 12 downloads — tree with shadcn Tooltip on each node. A useful pattern but very thin in scope; better implemented as a prop on any of the Gold trees than a standalone component.

bronze.title: Tree Folder Structure
bronze.reason: 27 downloads — Chakra UI TreeView inside a ChakraProvider wrapper. Non-Tailwind dependency chain makes it incompatible with the majority of target redesign stacks.

bronze.title: File Upload
bronze.reason: 6 downloads — this is a full file upload manager (grid/list view, sort, search, delete, download) miscategorised under file-trees. Impressive scope but wrong category and too complex to repurpose as a tree.
